name: Team Collins HQ
subject: Loyal supporter recognition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
It's Susan's campaign team reaching out from Bangor, ME. Today we are emailing only Susan's most loyal supporters about our strategy for 2020.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDE2NTc4NjIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MjY5MzEwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

_****_

**_LOYAL SUPPORTER RECOGNITION_

Name: Peter
Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Date: 1/29/2020**
---

Hey Peter,
It's Susan's campaign team reaching out from Bangor, ME. Today we are emailing only Susan's most loyal supporters about our strategy for 2020.
First and foremost, Susan is so thankful for the support you have shown her over the years. She knows how much you do for her even in the most difficult of times. As a trusted friend, we need to fill you in on the state of the race.
**Here is our plan + how you can help:**
At this point in the campaign, our primary focus is raising enough funds in order to be ready next fall. If we want to win, we must be well organized and well funded NOW.
**Based on our fundraising strategy, we have $55,000 to still raise before January ends. And we need your help to get there.** [**Please donate just $5, $10, or $25 to the campaign today to ensure Susan starts 2020 strong.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDE2NTc4NjIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MjY5MzEwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
By contributing today, you will show Susan that you stand with her. This is our first deadline for 2020, Peter. Thank you for your friendship and support.
Thanks,
Team Collins
[SUPPORT SUSAN >>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDE2NTc4NjIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MjY5MzEwMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump's Supreme Court issues another devastating ruling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The Supreme Court announced that it will allow the Trump administration to implement a "wealth test" for immigrants seeking residency or entry into the U.S. The Court's 5 conservative justices, including Trump picks Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh, have allowed the government to only admit the richest immigrants and make it more difficult for working class immigrants and refugees to get Green Cards. This is just the latest in the long series of horrific decisions by the Trump administration and his anti-choice, anti-immigrant lackeys on the Supreme Court to hurt immigrants and those seeking a better life in America. With impeachment taking up all the space on the airwaves, Trump will get away with this destructive policy move with little repercussion. We need to know what engaged Democrats think about this issue immediately before the news cycle moves on to the next crisis: **Do you approve of Trump's immigration policies****?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde58/6e9863e8/85af1da/1db06ee6/501344499/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Dxr-qpHp") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde58/6e9863e8/85af1da/1db06ee6/501344499/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Dxr-qpHp") Thank you for your response, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde58/6e9863e8/85af1da/1db06ee5/501344499/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200129c.ND&refcode2=D8iHnDvW3RG5D1MQkOiP")
---

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Did you see Joe's email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
|

| | Did you see Joe's email yesterday? **Untraceable dark money could soon begin flooding into our primary through a Markey Super PAC.** This would drown out the voices of Massachusetts voters. **We can 't back down. We need to show our opponent that people are stronger than Super PACs. [_Make a donation now to prove our voices are more powerful than dark money._](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390359/55b66746/226ab624/80ffe98/2109648793/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe-nopacs?refcode=2020-01-29-cant-back-down&recurring=1&amount=3")** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly. | [$3](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390359/55b66746/226ab624/80ffe99/2109648793/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe-nopacs?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=2020-01-29-cant-back-down&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$10](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390359/55b66746/226ab624/80ffe9a/2109648793/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe-nopacs?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=2020-01-29-cant-back-down&refcode2=express-buttons")
---|---
[$25](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390359/55b66746/226ab624/80ffe9b/2109648793/VEsC/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe-nopacs?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2020-01-29-cant-back-down&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390359/55b66746/226ab624/80ffea4/2109648793/VEsD/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe-nopacs?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2020-01-29-cant-back-down&refcode2=express-buttons")
-Team Kennedy
Forwarded Message
[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390359/55b66746/226ab624/80ffea5/2109648793/VEsA/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
News just broke that my opponent is trying to start a super PAC. Dark, unlimited and untraceable money could be coming into this race in a matter of weeks.
For a so-called progressive champion, he seems to forget something central to Democrats' generations-long fight for campaign finance reform:
_Super PACs are a dirty Republican tactic. Our party is better than this._
**So I'm asking you for help. We need to prove that people are more powerful than his super PAC.** [**Make a donation right now to help us fight against Ed Markey's dark money.**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390359/55b66746/226ab624/80ffe98/2109648793/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe-nopacs?refcode=2020-01-29-cant-back-down&recurring=1&amount=3")
This election is going to be won by people--not outside interests that want to protect the status quo. We need to fight back hard -- and show that dark money has no place in a progressive campaign or a progressive state.
I'm hoping you'll join me.
-Joe
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly.
[$3](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390359/55b66746/226ab624/80ffe99/2109648793/VEsO/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe-nopacs?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=2020-01-29-cant-back-down&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$10](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390359/55b66746/226ab624/80ffe9a/2109648793/VEsP/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe-nopacs?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=2020-01-29-cant-back-down&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: Booker HQ
subject: hey, team -- can you step up today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | Team, It's now been a little over two weeks since we launched Cory's re-election campaign. A lot has happened since he left the presidential race, but in these final days of the month, **we have to stay focused on hitting our $350,000 fundraising goal by January 31st at 11:59 p.m.** We're asking for your support to ensure that Cory is re-elected this November. He plans to keep fighting every single day for racial justice, economic justice, reproductive justice, environmental justice -- and so much more -- as a member of the Senate. But first, we need your help. **Here 's a link to donate right now to get us closer to goal: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200129_BHQ_20200129-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Let's do this,
Booker HQ _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Team, Running for president was one of the greatest honors of my life. I'll always be grateful that you were one of the people who stood with me as a supporter of our grassroots campaign. **Our presidential campaign is over, but the work to make justice and opportunity real for everyone must continue.** [**That 's why I'm running for re-election to the U.S. Senate this November. If you want me to return to the Senate for another term, please consider becoming a founding donor of my campaign.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200129_BHQ_20200129-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I've had the privilege of representing New Jersey in the Senate for over six years now. Even in the face of Donald Trump's hatred and division, I'm very proud of what we've accomplished over that time. At this critical moment in our history, I refuse to believe that real progress is impossible. **I know we can do big things together because we 've done them together.** I helped pass into law historic reforms that make our criminal justice system more fair. I have been a check on Trump while in the Senate and I will continue to do so when re-elected in 2020. And I helped create landmark incentives that draw new economic investment into communities across our state that need it most. [**I hope I 'll have your support as I seek another term in the Senate. Be one of the first to chip in today to help my re-election campaign.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200129_BHQ_20200129-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") From taking on the NRA, to fighting for a fairer economy, to protecting and expanding health coverage for New Jerseyans, I won't stop bringing people together to take on the biggest challenges that are leaving so many people and communities behind. I'm eager to see what we'll be able to accomplish in the years to come -- but I need your help to get there. I hope you're as excited about this as I am, team. Let's go out and win this thing.

Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200129_BHQ_20200129-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb7/5fca0d19/7ac9fee5/291d330c/2855778114/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb7/5fca0d19/7ac9fee5/291d330b/2855778114/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb7/5fca0d19/7ac9fee5/291d330a/2855778114/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb7/5fca0d19/7ac9fee5/291d3309/2855778114/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/unsubscribe").

name: Defeat Senator Cornyn
subject: BREAKING NEWS, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We won't lie -- this is A LOT of money.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489048e/7f51f7bc/4d5f6a7e/4ef0672a/587651570/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489048e/7f51f7bc/4d5f6a7e/4ef0672e/587651570/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgzNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200129.3nd__837__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Sen. Cornyn just announced HUGE fundraising numbers.
[Will you help us fight back with _grassroots power_?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489048e/7f51f7bc/4d5f6a7e/4ef0672e/587651570/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgzNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200129.3nd__837__&amount=10&recurring=true")
BREAKING NEWS, Peter. Senator Cornyn just released his fundraising number from last quarter: **_$2.75 million_** , bringing his cash on hand to over $12 million.

We won't lie -- that's A LOT of money. But our strategy has never been based on big donations -- it's based on building a MASSIVE people-powered movement.

**Will you be a part of that movement*? [Your donation -- even if it's just $1 -- will help us build the campaign that will defeat McConnell's henchman and finally put the Senate back to work for the people of Texas.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489048e/7f51f7bc/4d5f6a7e/4ef0672e/587651570/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgzNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200129.3nd__837__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Team Tina
subject: January is (unsurprisingly) a tough month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We are facing a unique challenge for Tina's re-election campaign and the best thing to do is just to tell you about it.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200129-eom13?refcode=em200129-eom13&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Team -- we are facing a unique challenge for Tina's re-election campaign and we all decided the best thing to do was just tell you about it:

Our very first monthly fundraising deadline of 2020 is coming up in just two days and we're falling short of our goal. The timing is a challenge.

Here's why: The goals we set each month are real. Whether or not we reach them determines if we have the resources to follow through on our strategy to win in November.

But January is (unsurprisingly) one of the toughest times for fundraising and we're worried the timing of our end-of-month deadline on Friday may make it difficult to catch up to this month's goal.

We cannot afford to fall short this early in an election year. Not with the Koch network planning to spend millions to prop up their chosen candidates in key races and with Donald Trump making Minnesota a top target in his re-election bid.

So, we're trying to raise what we can before Friday. That's why we're asking:

**Will you add a donation of $10 or more before our very first monthly fundraising deadline of the year? We know this is sort of an unusual ask, but it's really important.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200129-eom13?refcode=em200129-eom13&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: BREAKING: Cory Gardner officially announced he's against allowing firsthand witnesses in Trump's impeachment trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| Unbelievable --

My opponent, Cory Gardner, just announced he's officially voting **against** allowing firsthand witness testimony in Donald Trump's impeachment trial.

Cory Gardner should be doing everything in his power to ensure the American people learn the truth and that the rule of law is upheld.

But instead, Gardner is trying to protect Trump, no matter the costs. No one truly independent could possibly think the American people don't deserve to hear from firsthand witnesses.

**I 'm outraged. A trial without witnesses and evidence is not a trial at all. It's a sham.**

The people of Colorado -- and the entire country -- deserve better. That's why we have to do everything we can to flip the Senate this year, so I'm turning to you:

**[Will you rush a donation of $10 or more to my grassroots campaign to defeat Cory Gardner and take back the Senate? Every contribution will make a difference in this close election:](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_hick?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+rush+a+donation+of+ask+or+more+&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_180OP_Hickenlooper_200129_2_3&source=314_EM_FR_180OP_Hickenlooper_200129_2_3&refcode=314_EM_FR_180OP_Hickenlooper_200129_2_3")** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between John Hickenlooper and 314 Action.

Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country. If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can "" to make a donation.

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Today I need you to step up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=6640%2E377263%2EPnYDlP) Yang Gang --

Two days from now is the first FEC deadline of the year. In other words, if there were ever a day to step up and give just a little more than you were planning to, today’s that day.

We are less than 51 hours away from the FEC deadline at midnight on Friday, and we still have work to do to hit our ambitious $3 million goal.

[The truth is, we have come up short of our last two goals and we cannot miss three goals in a row -- so I’m asking you to help us close our fundraising gap. Make a contribution of $10 or more now and help us hit this $3 million goal by midnight on the 31st. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24004?t=5&akid=6640%2E377263%2EPnYDlP) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24004?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=6640%2E377263%2EPnYDlP)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24004?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=6640%2E377263%2EPnYDlP)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24004?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=6640%2E377263%2EPnYDlP)
---
| | [$100 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24004?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=6640%2E377263%2EPnYDlP)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24004?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=6640%2E377263%2EPnYDlP)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24004?t=11&amount=25&akid=6640%2E377263%2EPnYDlP)
---
**If we miss this goal:** We risk not having enough resources to continue making investments in Iowa and New Hampshire, and giving an opening to the mainstream media to write us off.

**If we hit this goal:** We’ll be on track to have the resources to double down on our investments in Iowa and New Hampshire, and give the mainstream media a story they have no choice but to write about -- that we hit a massive $3 million goal right before the Iowa caucus.

**Our task is clear and the stakes are high. Let’s leave it all on the field today, Yang Gang.** [Chip in $10 or more now.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24004?t=12&akid=6640%2E377263%2EPnYDlP)

Thank you,

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24004?t=13&akid=6640%2E377263%2EPnYDlP)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=6640%2E377263%2EPnYDlP) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=6640%2E377263%2EPnYDlP) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Steve Chabot
subject: March for Life, Ignored Again
body:
Little Lives Matter! No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Hundreds of Thousands of Marchers - Ignored Again](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-j/)
Last Friday, hundreds of thousands of people of all ages gathered in Washington, D.C. for the 2020 March for Life. It was an inspiring event and in fact, one of my favorite events of the year. In this week's blog, I discuss the march and make the case for why this event should no longer be ignored by the mainstream press. Little lives do matter! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [There's More Going on Than Impeachment](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-d/)
While most of the mainstream press has obsessed the past week about impeachment, President Trump just had two great victories that will greatly impact our economy. In this week's blog I discuss these developments and provide irrefutable evidence President Trump continues to achieve monumental results for the American people. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Is California Becoming the Homeless State?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-u/)
California was the state so many Americans aspired to move to. Now, many people are fleeing California and the state is rapidly becoming the "homeless state." Sadly homelessness is a nationwide problem, including back home in Cincinnati and Hamilton County. This week I discuss this epidemic and some possible solutions. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Was Trump Right to Take Out Soleimani?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-n/)
Virtually all the talking heads in the media, as well as congressional Democrats, have been critical of the President's decision to take out Iranian general Qassem Soleimani. However, I think it's important to look closely at the facts and not jump to conclusions. In this week's blog, I evaluate this ongoing situation unfolding in the Middle East. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---
6613 Glenway Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.

[ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-e/)
[ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jhwddud-l-s)
[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jhwddud-961825B2-kujkulhluu-g) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jhwddud-kujkulhluu-w/)

>
If you do need a little convincing, here are five reasons that might sway you:

1. Elizabeth might call you. Really! She makes phone calls to thank people who chip in any amount. Pro tip: She shows up as an unknown number.
2. You'll own an equal piece of this campaign, no matter the size of your contribution. No one gets special access or treatment just because they have a bigger bank account and can write a bigger check.
3. Your donation will make a difference because grassroots donors are the only people who fund our movement. We don't take any money from federal lobbyists or PACs of any kind.
4. Your donation supports a bold, progressive campaign with policy ideas that break new ground. Are you glad that Elizabeth is out there on the campaign trail proposing ideas like Universal Child Care and cancelling student loan debt? Do you love that she's got plans, plans, and more plans for big, structural change? You can help make those a reality.
5. With just three days before our FEC deadline, we have a big fundraising goal we need to hit. The Iowa caucuses in February will launch a new phase of this primary election, and hitting these goals are how we make sure we can power our movement all the way to election day.

**Can we make it official? Can we put it on the books?**

Will January 29, 2020 go down as the date you made your first contribution and owned a piece of this campaign for the first time? Will we celebrate your donate-iversary one year from today?

**[Your support makes everything possible and is the only way we hit this powerfully important fundraising goal. Can you chip $2 in right now?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a2d1/45c30650/1e72af1d9/66e025c4/358725564/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4zUUZfRU9NX0dPTF9QXzIwMjAwMTI5X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN3QF_EOM_GOL_P_20200129_V1S3_P")**

Thanks for being in this fight,

clean_body: According to our records for this exact email address, you haven't made a donation to support our campaign. There are lots of of ways to help grow our movement. And we appreciate all of them... | | | "" According to our records for this exact email address, you haven't made a donation to support our campaign. There are lots of ways to help grow our movement. And we appreciate all of them. But how would you feel about making your first contribution today? "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" If you do need a little convincing, here are five reasons that might sway you: 1. Elizabeth might call you. Really! She makes phone calls to thank people who chip in any amount. Pro tip: She shows up as an unknown number. 2. You'll own an equal piece of this campaign, no matter the size of your contribution. No one gets special access or treatment just because they have a bigger bank account and can write a bigger check. 3. Your donation will make a difference because grassroots donors are the only people who fund our movement. We don't take any money from federal lobbyists or PACs of any kind. 4. Your donation supports a bold, progressive campaign with policy ideas that break new ground. Are you glad that Elizabeth is out there on the campaign trail proposing ideas like Universal Child Care and cancelling student loan debt? Do you love that she's got plans, plans, and more plans for big, structural change? You can help make those a reality. 5. With just three days before our FEC deadline, we have a big fundraising goal we need to hit. The Iowa caucuses in February will launch a new phase of this primary election, and hitting these goals are how we make sure we can power our movement all the way to election day. Can we make it official? Can we put it on the books? Will January 29, 2020 go down as the date you made your first contribution and owned a piece of this campaign for the first time? Will we celebrate your donate-iversary one year from today? "" Thanks for being in this fight, Team Warren P.S. If you've donated under a different email address or mailed in a check -- thank you! You're the best! Don't worry, we have your donation recorded and will update your record shortly. name: Emily Cupples
subject: so close
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
Y’all, we are SO close. With your generosity we’re now only $2,080 away from this month’s goal. We’ve got until midnight tomorrow. Can you help us get there?
Last week Tennessee Gov. Bill Lee introduced a ‘Tennessee Fetal Heartbeat Bill’ that would ban all abortions after 6 weeks (at which point a lot of women don’t even know they’re pregnant yet) including ones based on a Down syndrome diagnosis or a diagnosis of a fetal abnormality. No politician, should insert themselves in the middle of the decision to end a pregnancy, choose adoption, or raise a child. Those decisions belong to a woman, her family and her faith, in consultation with her doctor or health care provider.
We need to elect Democrats so this sort of invasive legislation doesn’t get passed. That’s why the TNDP is putting so much effort towards finding and supporting candidates that share our vision of a better future for Tennessee. That’s why we need your support right now – so we can meet our goal this month and continue our mission. Can you help us right now, with whatever you can afford?
https://secure.ngpvan.com/nDbwiVfqw0KudnO3_Rq2MQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/nDbwiVfqw0KudnO3_Rq2MQ2]
Thank you,
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
--
Emily Cupples
Communications Director, Tennessee Democratic Party

Friend,

I've got exciting news to share with you.

_My team has purchased not one, but TWO, 30 second Super Bowl advertisements that will air on Sunday, and I want to give YOU an exclusive sneak preview of one of them._

We know that the Left will do whatever it takes to keep our ads quiet, so my team just launched our **Official Trump Super Bowl Ad Blitz Fund** to make sure EVERY Patriot gets the chance to see them.

With your help, let's raise **$1,000,000 in the NEXT 24 HOURS** to send a message and FLOOD THE AIRWAVES with our EPIC Super Bowl Ads.

Because our _January End-of-Month deadline is only 1 day away,_ I've decided to activate a _TRIPLE-MATCH on ALL CONTRIBUTIONS_ made to our **Ad Blitz Fund.**

| | | Mike Bloomberg has taken on the NRA ... and won. He founded Everytown for Gun Safety, a network of 6 million strong gun violence prevention supporters. He has helped pass lifesaving gun safety legislation and elected gun safety champions up and down the ballot. As President, he's committed to continuing the fight against the gun lobby to protect our families. No other candidate has invested more in keeping our kids safe. That's why Mike's new ad, which will air for all of America on Sunday night during the Super Bowl, raises up the story of a mother whose son's life was cut short by gun violence. [**Be one of the first to see this powerful message for commonsense gun safety legislation. Watch the ad today.**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=f361dd8c1f&e=f54746ec54)

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: This is what CNN thinks of you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l7XIPcQD5_3STfHZ85BPVUChy18eIknFbVD3MVMWKOXokkuZ7afd0-zNpSz_ElFYnFcwct8eBfTwmsXkqX-NJnzNUrK5_79GGEgkpPjSlUf0kvviYg7zbH14Pnz3mozwwEVJs9CiE2n_hFLHIKwxo1hbbc29-hCw&c=w201dpEJjFlVXMciPMtKBuLXUeBT3InbvaDb55ZbtKuaMQyL_YrjWg==&ch=iG-wy5GJVNegbJk-I2LRB3G4BnZVO0182G71y9sMNiKIRt20MVOYZA==)
---
| Patriot,
The media does not like you. They think you're uneducated, racist, homophobic, and you name it. CNN anchors like Don Lemon sit in their ivory towers, surrounded by people with the same far-left worldview, and mock Trump supporters. We all know this goes on, but the audacity to do it on live TV is something else.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l7XIPcQD5_3STfHZ85BPVUChy18eIknFbVD3MVMWKOXokkuZ7afd0-zNpSz_ElFYnFcwct8eBfTwmsXkqX-NJnzNUrK5_79GGEgkpPjSlUf0kvviYg7zbH14Pnz3mozwwEVJs9CiE2n_hFLHIKwxo1hbbc29-hCw&c=w201dpEJjFlVXMciPMtKBuLXUeBT3InbvaDb55ZbtKuaMQyL_YrjWg==&ch=iG-wy5GJVNegbJk-I2LRB3G4BnZVO0182G71y9sMNiKIRt20MVOYZA==)
---
| This is what the media thinks of you. These are the people that want to tell you how to think and who to vote for. They are truly the enemy of the people.
I hope you'll [join me](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l7XIPcQD5_3STfHZ85BPVUChy18eIknFbVD3MVMWKOXokkuZ7afd0-zNpSz_ElFYnFcwct8eBfTwmsXkqX-NJnzNUrK5_79GGEgkpPjSlUf0kvviYg7zbH14Pnz3mozwwEVJs9CiE2n_hFLHIKwxo1hbbc29-hCw&c=w201dpEJjFlVXMciPMtKBuLXUeBT3InbvaDb55ZbtKuaMQyL_YrjWg==&ch=iG-wy5GJVNegbJk-I2LRB3G4BnZVO0182G71y9sMNiKIRt20MVOYZA==) in standing up to the mainstream media. They can laugh at us all they want, but that will never deter us from fighting for what we believe in. President Trump and conservatives across the country are fighting an uphill battle with the entire American media against them, so I hope you'll [chip in](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l7XIPcQD5_3STfHZ85BPVUChy18eIknFbVD3MVMWKOXokkuZ7afd0-zNpSz_ElFYnFcwct8eBfTwmsXkqX-NJnzNUrK5_79GGEgkpPjSlUf0kvviYg7zbH14Pnz3mozwwEVJs9CiE2n_hFLHIKwxo1hbbc29-hCw&c=w201dpEJjFlVXMciPMtKBuLXUeBT3InbvaDb55ZbtKuaMQyL_YrjWg==&ch=iG-wy5GJVNegbJk-I2LRB3G4BnZVO0182G71y9sMNiKIRt20MVOYZA==) to help us Keep America Great in 2020.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l7XIPcQD5_3STfHZ85BPVUChy18eIknFbVD3MVMWKOXokkuZ7afd0-zNpSz_ElFYnFcwct8eBfTwmsXkqX-NJnzNUrK5_79GGEgkpPjSlUf0kvviYg7zbH14Pnz3mozwwEVJs9CiE2n_hFLHIKwxo1hbbc29-hCw&c=w201dpEJjFlVXMciPMtKBuLXUeBT3InbvaDb55ZbtKuaMQyL_YrjWg==&ch=iG-wy5GJVNegbJk-I2LRB3G4BnZVO0182G71y9sMNiKIRt20MVOYZA==)
---
| God bless America,
---
|
---
| Matt Gaetz

name: Paul Shashy, Campaign Manager
subject: Coach just called
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
33 days to go. | ACT NOW to help defeat Jeff Sessions!
Peter, I just got off the phone with Coach. I gave him an update, and he’s concerned. With just 33 days until the primary – _and less than 48 hours until our end-of-month fundraising deadline_ – we still need to raise $14,602. We need EVERY Alabama conservative who supports Coach to step up now in a big way. **[Make a $5 contribution (or more) today, and we’ll add your name to our donor wall!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c92ca9ea6f38050b/c62a2ca0ac38b791c3d6b838967d376c/33013)** [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c92ca9ea6f38050b/4e59d7715336da8cc3d6b838967d376c/33013) As you know, this race is a neck and neck contest now between Coach and career politician Jeff Sessions. And you may have seen the recent news that a new poll has Sessions UP by four points. Frankly, President Trump can’t count on Jeff Sessions... and neither can we! It’s vital that we reach and win over every undecided Republican voter we can, and get every one of Coach’s supporters to turn out to cast their ballot. That’s what your support will make happen. **[Will you chip in $5 or more today to help us reach our goal?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c92ca9ea6f38050b/e74a0a2a68947a51c3d6b838967d376c/33013)** Help us kick off February with the resources we’ll need to surge ahead and WIN. \- Paul [ Let’s add your name! Donate $5 or more >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c92ca9ea6f38050b/458cd0b3f1711f6dc3d6b838967d376c/33013) id:2020-01-28-14:41:49:961t | |

Hey, we wanted to send a quick update on our end-of-month fundraising progress:

**UPDATE** : Today is more than halfway through the week, but we're not halfway to our goal of $3.5 million before Friday's FEC deadline.

If everyone who hasn't donated during our end-of-month fundraising push yet chips in right now, we'll be able to reverse course and get back on track. But we know not everyone will, and that's why we're counting on you.

**[Hitting this goal is critical for Elizabeth's success. Please make your first donation to our FEC deadline fundraising push -- $2 or whatever you can would make an incredible difference. Iowa is just around the corner, and we need to fund our organizing and outreach programs.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a2f4/45c30650/1e4f80d6b/66e02bf2/3767333567/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4zSUZfRU9NX0dPTF9RXzIwMjAwMTMwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN3IF_EOM_GOL_Q_20200130_V1S2_P")**

name: Gary Peters
subject: the price for losing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
If we come up short, Democrats will have zero chance of taking back the Senate.
| | |
---
Friend,

The price for losing in Michigan is high: If we come up short, Democrats will have zero chance of taking back the Senate. And right now, national Republicans are funneling millions into Michigan to buy this seat for Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell.
There's good news, though. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can take back the Senate, and the Cook Political Report says the majority is in play. But recent polling shows me TIED with my Trump-backed opponent. **And the worst news of all? My opponent outraised me for the second straight time last month.**
With a race that will come down to the wire - and with Senate control on the line - every single fundraising goal from now to November matters immensely. **That's why, with everything stacked against us, we've got to raise another $25,000 before midnight tomorrow but right now, we're falling way short.**
**Friend, I'm counting on you more than ever:[Will you please rush $3 right now - whatever you can spare before midnight - to defend Michigan's Senate seat and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk249-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**
Thank you,

Gary
| [To unsubscribe from the Peters for Michigan email list, please click here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da9a0/5721a3ed/7015af83/efb6937/4040404468/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da9a0/5721a3ed/7015af83/efb6936/4040404468/VEsF/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da9a0/5721a3ed/7015af83/efb6935/4040404468/VEsC/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da9a0/5721a3ed/7015af83/efb6934/4040404468/VEsD/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe from our emails, click [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da9a0/5721a3ed/7015af83/efb6937/4040404468/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [Donate to Gary ->](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da9a0/5721a3ed/7015af83/efb6936/4040404468/VEsB/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") |

| | Friends-

It was an honor to be invited by President Trump to the White House to witness the signing of the historic United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement that will boost our state and national economy. I had the opportunity to speak with President Trump after the signing, and he told me I have his endorsement in this race for Congress!

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=90A105A1A1358)
---
| | |
---
| | I was proud to have played a small role by leading the effort to build local support in the State Assembly for the USCMA, which was endorsed by the Business Council of New York State, New York Farm Bureau and the Partnership for New York City.

While I was advocating for USMCA’s ratification, Rep. Max Rose co-signed a letter with Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez to delay and undermine President Trump’s trade agreement.

Jobs and the economy are my number one priority and when I’m elected to Congress, I look forward to supporting and continuing to work on policies that bring opportunities, jobs and economic stimulus to New York and the nation.

[Chip in $10, $25, $50 or any amount to help us keep up the momentum! Your support makes a difference.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=90A105A1A1358)

body:

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=0f34ffee08c44cd59dd8d783aa90618b&_e=FAjL8gVGYD1YGxlPUWtM139lgYc-dWU0I5WCF2xPz6QOy_JMUf65Kxvron0NEMYuX9jzmwm05spktRjnobWqxUDrb9XwYdtZE_IdvjOqu_J7wLmpOqyiNS7YYzm8evv4xNisChzQVOVOCXlS8SC8rshRHkQzufhQK3dQ6zr6UwdztcdgCh9CtFfGkhBlKdv_5WG4tPxn8cEh8vsdT5H2GDe3LCdH-rY8C4CrqqAaFTznXtpS7XUUdukMujt2iQaSL--ayUQUIXrxSlrjvhXqwjKQuG1hpPGGHMO3XSoD2c4iqRbnxjxjNQZt6EgWcXD0LqdHdtiJpLSUpGC4j8vcmISEBE1_bokuIdMxt0giQGU%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Come and take it Dems
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
The election results of the Texas State House of Representatives District 28 last night were astounding. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?e=01c99b7fbd&u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=cc7a94b134)
---
| |
---
| | Hi ,

You are a **TEXAN**. Your drive to fight for **LIBERTY** runs deep in your veins.

And when the anti-God, anti-Constitution, anti-Life Democrats send their big players into **YOUR NEIGHBORHOOD** to try and further destroy our country, **YOU DON’T BACK DOWN**.

**The election results of the Texas State House of Representatives District 28 last night were astounding.**

* * *

# ✅ **Gary Gates, Republican – 58%**
❌ Eliza Markowicz Democrat – 42%
* * *

That margin is more than wide – **that is a gulf of a difference!**

The Democrats sent in the most extreme of their national political players, along with hundreds of thousands of dollars:
* Beto
* Biden
* Warren
* Bloomberg
* Wendy Davis

Yet you and your neighbors showed up to the polls for a state race to let your vote be a loud NO to the efforts of the socialist Democrats to flip Fort Bend County blue.

**Come and take it Democrats!**

Fort Bend County is part of Congressional District 22, where I’m running to be your next Congressman. Brazoria, Harris, and Fort Bend – all with portions located in CD-22 – are home to liberty-loving diehard Texans like YOU.

Because the Democrats are continuing their impeachment hoax in Washington D.C. right now, they will not listen to the voice of the voters. They care so much about their anti-American agenda that they will stop at nothing to elect more progressive socialists to office. They are already re-grouping to fight even harder to flip Fort Bend and the rest of CD22 blue in 2020.

President Trump is working around the clock to drain the swamp, and **I’m working tirelessly to get to Washington D.C. to help him in that fight.**

Will you join the fight with me today to defeat the liberal left?
---
|
---
| [Yes! I want to fight the socialist Democrats](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=e35d50b08b&e=01c99b7fbd "Yes! I want to fight the socialist Democrats")
---
| Together, we will keep proclaiming “Come and take it, Democrats!”

For liberty,
Kathaleen Wall
---
| | Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
Kathaleen Wall for CongressP.O. Box 1429Sugar Land, TX 77487
[Add us to your address book](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877)
You can [update your preferences](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877&e=01c99b7fbd) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877&e=01c99b7fbd&c=cc7a94b134).
---

clean_body: I hate to do this, but I have to come to you with bad news. = Team, I hate to do this, but I have to come to you with bad news. Last week, we told you that dark money groups are investing even more money into influencing this district, and they’re doing it earlier than we thought they would. With Eugene’s Red to Blue announcement this week, we’re anticipating even more money to flood the district. So much so that we just had to update our monthly fundraising goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Team, there’s a reason these groups aren’t backing Eugene. Just this week, Mondaire crushed it at two different candidate debates, our campaign was endorsed by Senator Elizabeth Warren, and we just picked up another endorsement from New York Communities for Change. | | | Friend, ** We’ve got momentum on our side. Just this week, Mondaire crushed it at two different candidate debates, our campaign was endorsed by Senator Elizabeth Warren , and we just picked up another endorsement from New York Communities for Change. With all that exciting news, _ This is our first fundraising deadline of the New Year, and we need to finish the month strong. Many of our opponents are still willing to take corporate PAC money to fund their campaigns, but we’re relying only on supporters like you. We’re now less than five months out from the election. What we raise now will determine just how strong our campaign will be in those crucial last few months. name: Bill Olson
subject: The preborn child is a constitutional person
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hN2_VJWy9l6OuRU&b=.O_LMz2l0HoLWGWoLh3cGg

Hi Peter

Don't take my word for it. The Harvard Law Journal said as much!

When the [14th] Amendment was adopted in 1868, the states widely recognized children in utero as persons. Twenty‐three states and six territories referred to the fetus as a “child” in their statutes proscribing abortion. At least twenty‐eight jurisdictions labeled abortion as an “offense[] against the person” or an equivalent criminal classification.

Nine of the ratifying states explicitly valued the lives of the preborn and their pregnant mothers equally by providing the same range of punishment for killing either during the commission of an abortion. The “only plausible explanation” for this phenomenon is that “the legislatures considered the mother and child to be equal in their personhood.” Furthermore, ten states (nine of which had ratified the Fourteenth Amendment) considered abortion to be either manslaughter, assault with intent to murder, or murder.

We need to stand for the preborn, the way that our forefathers did!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hN2_VJWy9l6OuRU&b=.O_LMz2l0HoLWGWoLh3cGg
80% of Americans support at least some restrictions on abortion. This is a winning issue for us - and it will help me defeat Pelosi's "little buddy", Darren Soto!

To heck with the radical Socialists and their murderous ideology. Believe your eyes.

2020 is going to be an epic year for Trump and the Republicans. Can you help me win in Florida's 8th?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hN2_VJWy9l6OuRU&b=.O_LMz2l0HoLWGWoLh3cGg

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hN2_VJWy9l6OuRU&b=.O_LMz2l0HoLWGWoLh3cGg
of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

I need your help to oust the dangerous Dems from Congress. The numbers are there for us to win! Let's send "woke" Nancy Pelosi home in defeat!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hN2_VJWy9l6OuRU&b=.O_LMz2l0HoLWGWoLh3cGg

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hN2_VJWy9l6OuRU&b=.O_LMz2l0HoLWGWoLh3cGg

P.S. This is congressional seat we can win in the swing state of Florida. I must defeat this radical socialist Democrat. Please contribute now before the end of the month whatever you can afford.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hN2_VJWy9l6OuRU&b=.O_LMz2l0HoLWGWoLh3cGg
No amount is too small. God bless you and thank you - Bill.

---
Folks, our end of month deadline is TOMORROW -- **and we 're $7,079 short of our goal.**
I know we've reached out a lot over the past few days, but here's the deal: **Nikki is rejecting corporate PAC money, which makes it a lot more difficult for her to keep up with her Republican opponent 's fundraising.**
And, to be frank, whoever has the most money gets to set the tone of the race. National Republicans have already attacked Nikki and smeared her name, **we 're terrified of what they might say when they start to run television ads attacking her.**
**We need to be able to respond to attacks and make sure voters know who Nikki really is** \-- an Air Force combat pilot with a record of getting things done, and someone who won't hesitate to stand up to Donald Trump and fight for us.
But we can't do that if we don't hit our goals. clean_body: | | | | TIME LEFT UNTIL OUR DEADLINE "" | | "" Folks, our end of month deadline is TOMORROW -- and we 're $7,079 short of our goal. I know we've reached out a lot over the past few days, but here's the deal: Nikki is rejecting corporate PAC money, which makes it a lot more difficult for her to keep up with her Republican opponent 's fundraising. And, to be frank, whoever has the most money gets to set the tone of the race. National Republicans have already attacked Nikki and smeared her name, we 're terrified of what they might say when they start to run television ads attacking her. We need to be able to respond to attacks and make sure voters know who Nikki really is \-- an Air Force combat pilot with a record of getting things done, and someone who won't hesitate to stand up to Donald Trump and fight for us. But we can't do that if we don't hit our goals. "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Thank you, Team Nikki | | If you'd like to support Nikki Foster for OH, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. body:
---
| | | [](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200130_em_fr_b1_gillibrand_all_v2&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=25,50,100,250")
---
I asked once.

I wouldn't ask again if this wasn't downright critical.

[**_Could you rush $10 to help Ben Ray WIN his Senate race and FLIP McConnell 's Senate? The first end-of-month deadline of the entire election year hits in 24 hours, and I still need 1,872 more Democrats to step up to ensure Ben Ray serves alongside me in the Senate >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200130_em_fr_b1_gillibrand_all_v2&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=25,50,100,250")

I just watched Mitch McConnell orchestrate a shameful cover-up.

\- He rushed the impeachment trial through the Senate in the dead of night
\- He stopped witnesses from telling the American people the truth
\- He refused to consider new, critical evidence

[**Now, I want to watch McConnell lose his seat -- and his entire Senate Majority -- for what he 's done. **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200130_em_fr_b1_gillibrand_all_v2&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=25,50,100,250")

But if we lose Ben Ray's Senate race, this once-in-a-lifetime shot to defeat McConnell will be ruined. I can't bear the thought.

I need 1,872 Democrats to step up before his first deadline of the entire year hits in 24 hours. Can you help?

| ******[**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200130_em_fr_b1_gillibrand_all_v2&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=25,50,100,250")******

Thank you for everything,

Kirsten

[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b702/18e32a7f/51403418/7b227736/112968502/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b702/18e32a7f/51403418/7b227737/112968502/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b702/18e32a7f/51403418/7b227734/112968502/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b702/18e32a7f/51403418/7b227735/112968502/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b702/18e32a7f/51403418/7b22772a/112968502/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b702/18e32a7f/51403418/7b22772b/112968502/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

| | Peter, with the Senate impeachment trial continuing into its second week, the GOP is attacking the impeachment trial as "boring" in their latest attempt to convince Americans that the charges against Trump should be dismissed. Unfortunately, it seems to be working. According to a new poll from Emerson College, 17% of Democrats and 49% of Americans don't support removing Trump, a marked rise of 9% in support for Trump among Democrats in the past few days. We need to hear from you immediately so we can understand in real time where engaged Democrats stand: **Do you support removing Trump from office?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde5c/6e9863e8/8546886/1db06ef5/3070221718/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/dvDUJLp-x") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde5c/6e9863e8/8546886/1db06ef5/3070221718/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/dvDUJLp-x") Thank you so much for standing with us in this fight. name: Dan Lipinski
subject: Breaking News
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS
body:
Dear Peter :

There’s a lot of talk about “movements” in politics these days. At a recent event in my district a resident asked me, “We hear so much about the progressive ‘movement’ and some of their radical ideas. When are mainstream, commonsense Democrats going to have a movement of their own?”

That’s a great question. And I have a great answer: Come Join Team Lipinski .

I am a problem solver with a demonstrated record of bringing people together around workable solutions to lower healthcare costs, grow American jobs, protect our communities, and improve transportation, all without outrageous tax increases. I don’t follow a ‘movement’ in Washington – I lead on programs, policies, and funding that will bring tangible results to improve the lives of the residents of my district.

My opponent in this race -- backed by far-left extremists -- embraces a radical agenda that we cannot afford. Her ‘movement’ may be in fashion with the elite, but it is out of touch with the hard-working residents of Illinois’ Third District.

There are less than 50 days until election day on March 17, and I hope you will consider joining Team Lipinski in the fight to reclaim our Democratic Party as the party the represents the priorities and values of hard-working families who need a steady, reliable, commonsense advocate to fight for them each and every day in the halls of Congress.

As we approach our end of month fundraising deadline, I hope that you will consider a donation big or small to help our ‘movement’ make a real statement in this election.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-website-button?refcode=website&amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-website-button?refcode=website&amount=20]

P.S. Get on the ground with Team Lipinski this weekend! Please join us as we march in the Chinese Lunar New Year parade this Sunday, Feb. 2, at 1 p.m. The parade kicks off at 24th and Wentworth.

Thank you for your ongoing support.

Dan

PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS

Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list. [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/537d4929-9543-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8/8763a5c2-9c43-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzYzYTVjMi05YzQzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4lmrZDqU6z0S1LaatNEel5NrGoz_yWxELX4tXqXBbU4=&id=103593688&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com]

Peter,

Yesterday we kicked off our end of the month donor match and lots of people chipped in to get us closer to our goal of $5,000. But, we are still short of hitting that goal. We have just $3,442 left to hit our donor match goal. [**Help us close the gap!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14464340/151623283/533471126?refcode=013020&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTI1ZWE0Yi05ZDQzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3xbWe44fKrWxiFIwePP7TfJxQCUt35inTURH71NpIuA=)

Here is why it is important that you chip in. We just got information that one of our opponents is making big TV buys in Austin and Houston. We know that the way to win this election is to bring our message directly to voters, not waste it on high-dollar TV consultants. That is why it is critical you chip in and help us fully fund our plan to win this race.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14464341/151623284/533471126?refcode=013020&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTI1ZWE0Yi05ZDQzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3xbWe44fKrWxiFIwePP7TfJxQCUt35inTURH71NpIuA=)
Last election our campaign made huge strides by turning what was considered a "safe" Republican seat into a national battleground target. This race has all been about choosing the right person to finish the job and every single group to endorse in our district has choosen us. They know that we can bring together broad coalitions of support to send McCaul to an eary retirement. Will you join them and support our race?

clean_body: Peter, Yesterday we kicked off our end of the month donor match and lots of people chipped in to get us closer to our goal of $5,000. But, we are still short of hitting that goal. We have just $3,442 left to hit our donor match goal. = Here is why it is important that you chip in. We just got information that one of our opponents is making big TV buys in Austin and Houston. We know that the way to win this election is to bring our message directly to voters, not waste it on high-dollar TV consultants. That is why it is critical you chip in and help us fully fund our plan to win this race. = Last election our campaign made huge strides by turning what was considered a "safe" Republican seat into a national battleground target. This race has all been about choosing the right person to finish the job and every single group to endorse in our district has choosen us. They know that we can bring together broad coalitions of support to send McCaul to an eary retirement. Will you join them and support our race? = = Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: A message from Marc's Field Director
body:
Good morning, this is Ramiro...

Good morning Peter,

I'd like to introduce myself. My name is Ramiro Ojeda, and I am the field director for Marc and his congressional campaign. I am reaching out to you because I need your help.

We are behind.
We have been reaching out to voters, knocking on as many doors as we can each day. And yet, despite all of our efforts, I'm worried that we are falling behind where we need to be.

Sadly, it is a struggle to get people engaged. Many people will glance at this email, and assume someone else will step up. If we want to make a change in this district, we need to rise up to the occasion.

Block walk with Marc and me.
Please, sign up today (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/208692/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b9d7a7b338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_30_03_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b9d7a7b338-32267927) to knock on doors with Marc and me, and help us do better for District 18. I want to do better for the district I call home, and I believe that Marc is the person for the job.
https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/208692/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b9d7a7b338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_30_03_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b9d7a7b338-32267927
We can do better, but not without you.
I understand if you can't volunteer this weekend, but if you can, please donate to the campaign today (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b9d7a7b338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_30_03_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b9d7a7b338-32267927) . We need all the help we can get, and whatever you can give will keep us moving forward.

Express Donate: $5 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b9d7a7b338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_30_03_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b9d7a7b338-32267927)

Express Donate: $10 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b9d7a7b338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_30_03_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b9d7a7b338-32267927)

Express Donate: $25 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b9d7a7b338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_30_03_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b9d7a7b338-32267927)

Or, donate another amount (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?refcode=express_lane_other&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b9d7a7b338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_30_03_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b9d7a7b338-32267927)

Thank you for everything,

Ramiro

clean_body: Good morning, this is Ramiro... Good morning Peter, I'd like to introduce myself. My name is Ramiro Ojeda, and I am the field director for Marc and his congressional campaign. I am reaching out to you because I need your help. We are behind. We have been reaching out to voters, knocking on as many doors as we can each day. And yet, despite all of our efforts, I'm worried that we are falling behind where we need to be. Sadly, it is a struggle to get people engaged. Many people will glance at this email, and assume someone else will step up. If we want to make a change in this district, we need to rise up to the occasion. Block walk with Marc and me. Please, sign up today () to knock on doors with Marc and me, and help us do better for District 18. I want to do better for the district I call home, and I believe that Marc is the person for the job. We can do better, but not without you. I understand if you can't volunteer this weekend, but if you can, please donate to the campaign today () . We need all the help we can get, and whatever you can give will keep us moving forward. Express Donate: $5 () Express Donate: $10 () Express Donate: $25 () Or, donate another amount () Thank you for everything, Ramiro ============================================================ Facebook () Twitter () Link () Website () Copyright © 2020 Marc Flores for Congress, All rights reserved.

Friend, We are getting close to hitting the final stretch of our campaign where we'll finally send Kay Granger packing. As of today, **we are on pace to reaching this month 's fundraising goals and setting ourselves up for a victory on March 3rd.** That being said, we still have a lot of work to do between now and tomorrow at midnight. My team just told me that we're still **72 donors short****** of meeting this month's goal. name: Carly Reilly
subject: We didn’t expect this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
It’s not looking good

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=6652%2E377263%2EpcybrO) Yang Gang --

Last week, we set a goal of raising a $3 million by the end of the month. **It’s not looking good.** [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24027?t=5&akid=6652%2E377263%2EpcybrO) With such little time to go before voting starts in Iowa, we did not expect this type of slowdown. We budgeted under the assumption we would hit this goal. Instead, we’re falling short.

Needless to say, this is bad timing -- and we are extremely worried. Now more than ever, we need to see a surge of fundraising dollars pouring in to boost our chances in the Iowa caucuses next week and the upcoming primary states.

**[We need you to step up and help us turn this around, Yang Gang. Will you chip in with a meaningful contribution and help us close the gap?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24027?t=6&akid=6652%2E377263%2EpcybrO)**

Thank you,

Carly Reilly
Finance Director | **We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24027?t=7&akid=6652%2E377263%2EpcybrO)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=6652%2E377263%2EpcybrO) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=6652%2E377263%2EpcybrO) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

With such little time to go before voting starts in Iowa, we did not expect this type of slowdown. We budgeted under the assumption we would hit this goal. Instead, we’re falling short. Needless to say, this is bad timing -- and we are extremely worried. Now more than ever, we need to see a surge of fundraising dollars pouring in to boost our chances in the Iowa caucuses next week and the upcoming primary states. Thank you, Carly Reilly Finance Director | We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now. |

name: Michael Bennet
subject: I owe you an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friend: [In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make your first $5 donation to my campaign, but you should know why first.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab0f/134673f2/378ebfa3/69975406/1652844317/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_013020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

My finance team crunched the numbers, and we're short of our goal this month.

[We've launched ads, announced new endorsements, expanded our field staff, and hosted more than 40 town halls in the past month and a half, but we need to raise another $45,000 before MIDNIGHT tomorrow if we're going to reach our fundraising goal and keep building at the pace we need to succeed!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab0f/134673f2/378ebfa3/69975406/1652844317/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_013020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

While other candidates have burned out after months or even years in the spotlight, I'm just getting started.

These early voting states are just the starting line, team!

Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I have taken in this journey is because grassroots supporters like you have supported me and ensured this campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[Friends, I'm asking, will make your first donation today? Any amount you donate today will help us start strong in early voting states >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab0f/134673f2/378ebfa3/69975406/1652844317/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_013020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab0f/134673f2/378ebfa3/6997541a/1652844317/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_013020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---

I know this is a big goal to hit, team.

But if we reach it, we can keep funding ads, building our movement, and reaching out to the more than half of Democrats who haven't made up their minds yet about who they are supporting in this primary.

[We will win this election the same way we always have: by presenting a unifying vision for our country.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab0f/134673f2/378ebfa3/69975406/1652844317/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_013020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

body:

**Will you help me keep Minnesota blue? If so, pitch in whatever you can afford toward our first monthly fundraising deadline of 2020 right here:** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200130-eom14?refcode=em200130-eom14&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

My opponent, Jason Lewis, has the backing of Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and all of their special interest backers. To defeat shadowy players like them, we need to build a strong organization that can overcome the mountains of cash and attacks that will surely come our way.

As you may remember, Donald Trump lost Minnesota by just 1.5 percentage points in 2016. So, he's coming back with full force this time around -- and my opponent is planning on riding his coattails to victory.

**So, I'm asking you: Will you add a donation of whatever you can to help me save this Senate seat and keep Minnesota blue? Our first end-of-month deadline of 2020 ends tomorrow. Anything you can give will go a long way.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200130-eom14?refcode=em200130-eom14&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200130-eom14?refcode=em200130-eom14&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200130-eom14?refcode=em200130-eom14&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thanks for being such a critical member of this team. I'm confident that if enough of us come together, no one -- not even Donald Trump or Mitch McConnell -- can stop us.

Thanks for everything.

-- Tina

name: Team Markey
subject: Is this something you can help with?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
We're asking you to contribute to our campaign before tomorrow's deadline.
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de55/693b8b0a/435581ee/72de4877/3554573323/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

[**We 're asking you to contribute $3 to our campaign before tomorrow's deadline. We were outraised last quarter. That's why we've set such an ambitious goal for this month.**](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de55/693b8b0a/435581ee/72de4876/3554573323/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMzAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200130-full")****
Political insiders and the media are always going to focus on the top line numbers -- who raised the most and what the polls say.
But we know that doesn't tell the full story of how a campaign is doing. To find that out, you need to pull back the curtain and look at the number of people powering a campaign -- giving whatever time, energy, or money they can afford to help build our movement.
You see, they always underestimate progressive campaigns like ours because they overlook YOU and the thousands of people in the trenches alongside us.
With this deadline, we want to wake up those who are counting us out and force them to take note of our grassroots movement.
That's why our goal is focused on the number of donations -- not an amount. We are trying to reach 1,000 more donations before tomorrow at midnight. If enough people step up today, we'll get there. Is this something you can help us with?
[**Please make a $3 donation right now to help us demonstrate the power of this movement. Each donation sends a powerful message about our campaign 's strength that the media and political insiders will not be able to ignore. **](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de55/693b8b0a/435581ee/72de4876/3554573323/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMzAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200130-full")
We know that the only way we will win is by building a grassroots movement powered by lots and lots of people like you.
We've made incredible progress this year, but there's so much more to be done. Thank you in advance for making a contribution to help us keep doing that work.
\- Team Markey
********[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de55/693b8b0a/435581ee/72de4876/3554573323/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMzAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200130-full")********

* * *
