To find that out, you need to pull back the curtain and look at the number of people powering a campaign -- giving whatever time, energy, or money they can afford to help build our movement. You see, they always underestimate progressive campaigns like ours because they overlook YOU and the thousands of people in the trenches alongside us. With this deadline, we want to wake up those who are counting us out and force them to take note of our grassroots movement. That's why our goal is focused on the number of donations -- not an amount. We are trying to reach 1,000 more donations before tomorrow at midnight. If enough people step up today, we'll get there. Is this something you can help us with? "" We know that the only way we will win is by building a grassroots movement powered by lots and lots of people like you. We've made incredible progress this year, but there's so much more to be done. Thank you in advance for making a contribution to help us keep doing that work. \- Team Markey **** ""**** Paid for by The Markey Committee

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump's USMCA Is Not Just Biggest Deal Ever—It's an International Game Changer
body:
The deal is an unequivocal win for America and will help Canada and Mexico over the long run. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=074b4783b5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump's USMCA Is Not Just Biggest Deal Ever—It's an International Game Changer**

“As a candidate, Donald Trump called NAFTA the ‘worst trade deal ever’ and vowed its replacement. On Wednesday, he fulfilled that promise, signing the new USMCA trade pact covering North America. The deal is Trump’s biggest yet—in fact the biggest in history,” foreign policy and diplomacy expert Christian Whiton writes for Fox Business.

"The deal is an unequivocal win for America and will help Canada and Mexico over the long run. It puts an end to unfair Canadian tariffs that amounted to nearly 300 percent in some cases, thus creating a level playing field for American farmers and ranchers."

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e4d23543f2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Deaths from drug overdoses dropped slightly in 2018, a first in nearly two decades as the nation confronts a massive opioid epidemic. The reduction in drug overdose deaths, reported Thursday by the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, of 4.1%, helped to slightly bump up life expectancy from 78.6 years in 2017 to 78.7 years in 2018,” Kimberly Leonard reports for the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a5402f7c54&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Three of our last nine presidents have faced impeachment, while only one of the previous 36 did. This is an unacceptable new normal, and Senate Republicans should send a clear message to future Congresses that cynical partisan impeachment will be thwarted. Perhaps even a few courageous Democrats can join them,” David Marcus writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=997adb0f94&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “A new Gallup poll indicates that satisfaction with race relations and the position of minorities in America have significantly increased since President Trump took office." The President's record includes more funding for Historically Black Colleges and Universities as well as historic criminal justice reform, Rusty Weiss reports for [_The Political Insider_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=58d525b9ee&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=15437e360a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4e4364348c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=485f793c3f)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Second Generation Endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/tmTTOPAUCEcD2-QxmZHoMJSXpkFQ56IWk-7ik0Yz7Tk=/jDpVjkCM49IxkEU_2OGj9CI-UBshofbrAROfwvZJiYQ=)

Hi Friends,

Today, we are proud to announce that Second Generation PAC,
a committee that seeks to empower immigrant communities in the political process,
endorsed me for the 2020 Democratic Auditor General state office in Pennsylvania.

"I am thrilled and honored to receive this endorsement," said Ahmad. "As an immigrant without an extensive support system, validation of my candidacy by Second Generation is critical and affirming. I am committed to working towards a 'more perfect union' so all communities can thrive, regardless of where they were born."

[Click Here to read the Second Generation's press release](https://act.myngp.com/el/tmTTOPAUCEcD2-QxmZHoMJSXpkFQ56IWk-7ik0Yz7Tk=/jDpVjkCM49IxkEU_2OGj9CI-UBshofbrAROfwvZJiYQ=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/tmTTOPAUCEcD2-QxmZHoMJSXpkFQ56IWk-7ik0Yz7Tk=/UJBeHk-uFUySteUL0UZhir-OiBNyfxDcZpTVWm7Nomg=)

Nina is running for auditor general for two simple reasons:
To increase transparency and accountability in Pennsylvania.
We deserve to know what our state government is doing and who is doing it. When the system fails, someone needs to be held accountable.

name: Sara Gideon for Senate
subject: First, Susan Collins hinted that she was open to considering witnesses. Then, she voted ten times along party lines to block witness testimony and evidence in the impeachment trial. Now, she says she may support efforts to consider allowing "a witness or two."
body:
She's always gonna move the football.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ef4/4bef7a87/6a920ca1/287fb545/4210771206/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
First, Susan Collins hinted that she was open to considering witnesses. Then, she voted ten times along party lines to block witness testimony and evidence in the impeachment trial.
Now, she says she may support efforts to consider allowing "a witness or two" and it's got people feeling like this:
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ef4/4bef7a87/6a920ca1/287fb544/4210771206/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMzAtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200130-1-full")
Are you ready to elect a Senator you can trust? Someone who won't talk about doing one thing and then move the football at the last minute?
**[Then chip in $3 to support Sara Gideon's campaign for Senate right now. Together, we will defeat Susan Collins.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ef4/4bef7a87/6a920ca1/287fb544/4210771206/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMzAtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200130-1-full")**
Susan Collins is the least popular Senator in the entire country because she has pulled this routine again and again. She'll say one thing when she's in front of reporters and then vote the opposite.
Mainers have had enough, and so have we. **[So let's fight to replace her with Sara Gideon.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ef4/4bef7a87/6a920ca1/287fb544/4210771206/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMzAtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200130-1-full")**

Team Sara

subject: It's that time again, team

body:
The Admiral has been busy. He's traveling all around Iowa, meeting Monroe, Scott, Clinton and Grundy County Democrats. He's picked up some great endorsements -- like Serve America, Rep. Seth Moulton's
|

| |
---

| | Hi folks, The Admiral has been busy. He's traveling all around Iowa, meeting Monroe, Scott, Clinton and Grundy County Democrats. He's picked up some great endorsements -- like Serve America, Rep. Seth Moulton's group. **And he 's gearing up for an intense February. ** **We 've just seen Joni Ernst admit to the corrupting influence her party has over her -- she's using her public office and perverting the impeachment process for her own political gain. ** That's why I'm starting a 2020 Founding Donor drive -- so we can take back our state and elect responsible leadership: Mike Franken. **Can you be one of the 1,400 folks to make a donation from now until midnight on Friday?[Click here and chip in >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24de/33365068/4a6e561b/3f8be182/1732788963/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200130_eom1_em_fr_L1&amount=10")** | [2020 Founder's Gift Portal >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24de/33365068/4a6e561b/3f8be183/1732788963/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200130_eom1_em_fr_btn1&amount=10")
---
Mike's vision for Iowa -- and our country -- is what we need in Washington. He's got the experience in foreign affairs and national security from nearly 40 years in the Navy to rebuild our image abroad.
Growing up in rural Sioux County, Mike learned early the value of hard work and a deep sense of service to his community. I'm excited for the future of Iowa under Mike's leadership.
But our only chance of making this a reality in November is by having a strong donor foundation in January. **[Can you become one of the 1,400 who helps hit this goal by chipping in $5, $10, or whatever you can spare before midnight on Friday?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24de/33365068/4a6e561b/3f8be19c/1732788963/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200130_eom1_em_fr_L2&amount=10")**

Thank you,
Kimberley
Campaign Manager

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Fwd: BREAKING: Cory Gardner officially announced he's against allowing firsthand witnesses in Trump's impeachment trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- the grassroots response to our campaign since Gardner announced he was voting _against_ witnesses in Trump's impeachment trial has been incredible.** ** We must keep this momentum going if we're going to elect an independent voice in Washington who will stand up to Trump and McConnell. **[Please read my message from yesterday below, then consider making a donation of any amount before our January fundraising deadline tomorrow.](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200129-witnesses?refcode=em-200130-bump-full&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *

Unbelievable -- My opponent, Cory Gardner, just announced he's officially voting **against** allowing firsthand witness testimony in Donald Trump's impeachment trial. Cory Gardner _should_ be doing everything in his power to ensure the American people learn the truth and that the rule of law is upheld. But instead, Gardner is trying to protect Trump, no matter the costs. No one truly independent could possibly think the American people don't deserve to hear from firsthand witnesses. **I 'm outraged. A trial without witnesses and evidence is not a trial at all. It's a sham.** The people of Colorado -- and the entire country -- deserve better. That's why we have to do everything we can to flip the Senate this year, so I'm turning to you: **Will you rush a donation of $10 or more to my grassroots campaign to defeat Cory Gardner and take back the Senate? Every contribution will make a difference in this close election:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200129-witnesses?refcode=em-200130-bump-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

It's time we take back our government and put power back in the hands of the people. Thanks for taking action.
-- John

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Some worrisome poll numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, A recent _Washington Post_ -ABC News poll found that 56% of Americans approve of Trump's handling of the economy, up 10% from September \-- that's the highest it's been throughout his presidency. Economic approval is a key indicator of success for presidential re-election, and with his job approval rating up to 44% despite the impeachment proceedings, Trump stands a good chance of winning in November. That's why we need to know: **Are you voting for Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde5e/6e9863e8/851c10b/1db0682a/3748696841/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/3qAXAhve") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde5e/6e9863e8/851c10b/1db0682a/3748696841/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/3qAXAhve") Thank you for your response, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde5e/6e9863e8/851c10b/1db0682f/3748696841/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200130b.ND&refcode2=KvppT6oiI0s4VIcb12Nf")

name: Andrew Yang
subject: I have many feelings after over two years in this race.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=6665%2E377263%2ER1A1SW) Yang Gang --

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to our campaign, but first, I want to tell you what’s at stake leading up to the Iowa caucuses.

The future of our campaign lies in your hands. If you don’t step up in this critical time right before the Iowa caucuses, everything we’ve been fighting so hard for could be lost. And there are no do-overs.

**I wish I were exaggerating -- but this is a fight for the future of our country.** The goal we set to hit by tomorrow night is part of our strategy to win the nomination and go on to defeat Trump in November.

[Yang Gang, will you stand with me right now and pitch in $10 or whatever you can afford toward our $3 million goal and ensure the work we’ve put in results in a win? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24046?t=5&akid=6665%2E377263%2ER1A1SW) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24046?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=6665%2E377263%2ER1A1SW)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24046?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=6665%2E377263%2ER1A1SW)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24046?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=6665%2E377263%2ER1A1SW)
---
| | [$100 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24046?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=6665%2E377263%2ER1A1SW)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24046?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=6665%2E377263%2ER1A1SW)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24046?t=11&amount=25&akid=6665%2E377263%2ER1A1SW)
---
I have many feelings after over two years in this race. After meeting thousands of Americans across the country, looking them in the eye, and telling them they deserve better from their country -- I am more determined than ever to make Humanity First a reality.

Each time our message reaches another person and helps them see that the opportunity to get their own slice of the American Dream is possible, we grow and fortify our movement.

[That is why your contribution now is more important than it’s ever been. We have to make history -- before it’s too late. Pitch in $10 or more now so we can hit our goal by tomorrow night. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24046?t=12&akid=6665%2E377263%2ER1A1SW)

The hard truth is we won’t beat Donald Trump with what’s coming out of Washington today -- old ideas and angry rhetoric. Donald Trump is a symptom of a broken system. **To defeat him, we need to band together and make our movement the most powerful in politics today.**

Let’s win.

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24046?t=13&akid=6665%2E377263%2ER1A1SW)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=6665%2E377263%2ER1A1SW) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=6665%2E377263%2ER1A1SW) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
© 2020 Friends of Andrew Yang
All Rights Reserved
New York, NY
[Privacy Policy](https://www.yang2020.com/privacy-policy?t=4&akid=6665%2E377263%2ER1A1SW)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chris=20Christie?=
subject: ICYMI: CIPP Reaches Historic Partnership With Seton Hall University
body:
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Peter,
Bridging the partisan gap in politics is no small task, but I’ve never been one to shy away from a challenge. **[NorthJersey.com recently covered](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=3fdce1c29c&e=65ae29fa7e) **our institute’s historic partnership with Seton Hall Law School. CIPP will provide scholarships and training to law students interested in pursuing a career in public service. As an alumni of Seton Hall Law School myself, I’m proud to partner with such a venerable organization. I also wanted to make sure you had a chance to see CIPP’s inaugural lecture with New York Governor Andrew Cuomo. I’m grateful to have had the opportunity to kick off this lecture series with a great friend and public servant.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=4b75d4523d&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
Governor Andrew Cuomo At Christie Institute - Inaugural Lecture
|

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Chris Christie
---

name: Team Warren
subject: That's it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
On this campaign, we raise the resources we need by asking grassroots supporters like you to chip in what they can. That's it. Elizabeth doesn't host exclusive fancy fundraisers for wealthy donors... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a22b/45c30650/1e4a246ef/66e0dbd4/1988273754/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
On this campaign, we raise the resources we need by asking grassroots supporters like you to chip in what they can. **That's it**.

Elizabeth doesn't host exclusive fancy fundraisers for wealthy donors, and she doesn't take corporate PAC money or checks from federal lobbyists.

That means even as we're facing a fundraising gap before a huge FEC deadline, she's not turning to wealthy donors in high-rise penthouses or outside super PACs to save the day. She won't make a quick call to so-and-so with a spiffy suit to ask them to write a big check.

It certainly makes fundraising more challenging, but Elizabeth wouldn't want it any other way. Because she believes everyone should have equal access to a candidate's time -- which is why she's taken over 100,000 selfies and spent zero minutes on the phone asking wealthy donors to bankroll our movement.

**But that means hitting this important goal before tomorrow's deadline comes down to supporters like you chipping in to emails like this one. We're still pacing behind our goal, but if everyone reading this email can chip in right now, we'll be able to close the gap.**

[**Elizabeth is relying on you. Can you donate $2 or anything you can right now to help hit this goal before the Iowa caucuses?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a22b/45c30650/1e4a246ef/66e0dbd7/1988273754/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4zTUZfRU9NX05GRl9UXzIwMjAwMTMwX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN3MF_EOM_NFF_T_20200130_V1S1_P")

clean_body: On this campaign, we raise the resources we need by asking grassroots supporters like you to chip in what they can. That's it. Elizabeth doesn't host exclusive fancy fundraisers for wealthy donors... | | | "" On this campaign, we raise the resources we need by asking grassroots supporters like you to chip in what they can. That's it. Elizabeth doesn't host exclusive fancy fundraisers for wealthy donors, and she doesn't take corporate PAC money or checks from federal lobbyists. That means even as we're facing a fundraising gap before a huge FEC deadline, she's not turning to wealthy donors in high-rise penthouses or outside super PACs to save the day. She won't make a quick call to so-and-so with a spiffy suit to ask them to write a big check. It certainly makes fundraising more challenging, but Elizabeth wouldn't want it any other way. Because she believes everyone should have equal access to a candidate's time -- which is why she's taken over 100,000 selfies and spent zero minutes on the phone asking wealthy donors to bankroll our movement. But that means hitting this important goal before tomorrow's deadline comes down to supporters like you chipping in to emails like this one. We're still pacing behind our goal, but if everyone reading this email can chip in right now, we'll be able to close the gap. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Thank you so much for all that you do, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2020 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Blue Texas 2020
subject: Urgent: Double the GOP staff in TX
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
You can make twice the impact in fighting back for Wendy...
| | |
---
**BREAKING FROM POLITICO:
Republicans are DOUBLING their campaign field staff - and sending them to defeat us in Texas!**
Friend: National Republicans have hundreds of millions of dollars at their disposal - _virtually unlimited resources_ - and they'll be spending BIG to keep anti-choice extremist Chip Roy in the House. That means the future of this race, and the future of our reproductive rights, is in serious danger.
**Luckily, a group of donors just offered to MATCH ALL GIFTS to help us fight back against the GOP, flip TX-21 blue and expand our Democratic majority in the House. But with just one day left to hit our match goal, we're still $5,900 short!**
If we're going up against the GOP's millions, we can't waste this opportunity to stretch every dollar TWICE as far. **That's why Wendy Davis is counting on you to donate every dollar you can before this match expires!**
**[Rush $3 or more- becomes $6! - to help Wendy Davis defeat the GOP, flip this seat blue and expand our Democratic majority in the House!](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk61-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**

clean_body: If you do, let’s do everything we can this year to either defeat or demote him to Senate Minority Leader. | | | Hey, I have a question for you: Do you want to make Mitch McConnell furious? If you do, let’s do everything we can this year to either defeat or demote him to Senate Minority Leader. But the only way we can do that is if we flip the Senate blue. If we win this race, Mitch McConnell will be LIVID! Let’s do it, Trent Bolger \----- Forwarded message ----- We have amazing news! After a surge of support late last night, we’re now 50% of the way towards Friday’s goal. This is great that we’ve managed to dig ourselves out of the hole we dug, but we haven’t hit our goal yet and we only have 48 hours left to do it. name: Grant Herring
subject: FWD: Jim Justice thinks he knows what’s best for West Virginians.
body:
Did you catch our last email?
Team,
We want to make sure you didn’t miss our email about the critically important fundraising deadline coming up. We’re getting closer to our 500 grassroots donors goal, and Ben is counting on you to help us cross the finish line to defeat Jim Justice!
Ben is ready to fight for you and move West Virginia forward. [**The clock is ticking, team. Help us reach our goal to give us that last shot of momentum before February!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14471836/151708442/2023015563?refcode=em_eom4_013020_link1&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGNkMmZiNS1jNTQzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=odicMLUb6x-WRPs4rBo3qu9FELapQ6j-aX4984KIBPg=)
Let’s do this,
Grant Herring

**Begin forwarded message:**
> Team, we've confirmed what West Virginians already know:
> **West Virginia can’t afford another four years of Jim Justice.** Not only has he failed working West Virginia families, but the majority of voters want him out! But we are up against Justice’s billionaire buddies - they aren't going down without a fight.
> [**Help us bring the fight to Jim Justice by pitching in $25 or whatever you can >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14471837/151708443/2023015563?refcode=em_eom3_012820_link1&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGNkMmZiNS1jNTQzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=odicMLUb6x-WRPs4rBo3qu9FELapQ6j-aX4984KIBPg=)
> **We are out to send a message to Jim Justice - real leaders show up to work.** Help us prove that the people are more powerful than a deadbeat billionaire who doesn’t pay his bills and uses the extra money to finance his campaign.
> **Our goal: 500 grassroots donors.
> We have: 122 grassroots donors in the past 48 hours.
> We need: 378 more grassroots donors before the February 1st deadline.**
> Ben is dedicated to moving West Virginia forward by prioritizing investments in public education, creating more good-paying jobs, expanding access to health care, fixing our roads, and fighting the opioid epidemic. **We can count on Ben to fight for West Virginia’s working families - but we’re counting on you to keep our fight going strong!**
> [**Make a contribution now to help us push our fight to bring real leadership back to West Virginia.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14471838/151708444/2023015563?refcode=em_eom3_012820_link2&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGNkMmZiNS1jNTQzLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=odicMLUb6x-WRPs4rBo3qu9FELapQ6j-aX4984KIBPg=)

clean_body: Did you catch our last email? Team, We want to make sure you didn’t miss our email about the critically important fundraising deadline coming up. We’re getting closer to our 500 grassroots donors goal, and Ben is counting on you to help us cross the finish line to defeat Jim Justice! Ben is ready to fight for you and move West Virginia forward. = Let’s do this, Grant Herring Begin forwarded message: Team, we've confirmed what West Virginians already know: West Virginia can’t afford another four years of Jim Justice. Not only has he failed working West Virginia families, but the majority of voters want him out! But we are up against Justice’s billionaire buddies - they aren't going down without a fight. = We are out to send a message to Jim Justice - real leaders show up to work. Help us prove that the people are more powerful than a deadbeat billionaire who doesn’t pay his bills and uses the extra money to finance his campaign. Our goal: 500 grassroots donors. We have: 122 grassroots donors in the past 48 hours. We need: 378 more grassroots donors before the February 1st deadline. Ben is dedicated to moving West Virginia forward by prioritizing investments in public education, creating more good-paying jobs, expanding access to health care, fixing our roads, and fighting the opioid epidemic. We can count on Ben to fight for West Virginia’s working families - but we’re counting on you to keep our fight going strong! = Let’s do this! Team Salango | = --- Ben Salango for WV Ben Salango for West Virginia PO Box 11650 Charleston, WV 25339 United States Click here to Follow our campaign on , , and . name: info@michaelbennet.com
subject: we'll prove them wrong every time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team,

As a Senator from Colorado -- a purple swing state -- Michael has never known an easy election.

Only 3% of Coloradans knew him when he started his first Senate campaign.

Against impossible odds, he went on to beat a Tea Party Republican in a terrible year for Democrats.

Six years later, _he did it again._

The pundits considered him a long shot then -- and some are saying the same thing now.

[We proved them wrong before - and we're ready to prove them wrong every time.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab0b/134673f2/3782dda4/69975576/2133565495/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_013020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Right now we're facing a crucial deadline - raising another $45,000 by midnight tomorrow. We know it won't be easy - but neither were Michael's two victories in Colorado.

[We need your support. Will you step up now and rush a donation today? Any amount you can give -- $3, $5, or even $29 -- will get us closer to achieving our goal to raise another $45,000 ahead of our FEC deadline >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab0b/134673f2/3782dda4/69975576/2133565495/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_013020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Jay Inslee
subject: SHARE: Warmest. Decade. Ever.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This is our one shot. We can't sit back.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8407?t=3&akid=8027%2E868730%2Ed05asT) Friend, There's one thing I've been shouting from the rooftops for years: _We are running out of time to defeat climate change._ And the news from earlier this month -- that this past decade was the warmest _ever_ recorded and that the last year was the second warmest year in _history_ \-- proves that in a truly terrifying way. After that news, scientists moved the Doomsday Clock even closer to midnight. But it doesn't take an atomic scientist to know Doomsday is looming ever closer: We can feel it and see it all around us. Every community, every family, every city in America -- heck, the world -- is experiencing the effects of the climate crisis. [**Our friends and family need to know what's at stake. We're running down the clock -- and there is no going back. Share the news on Facebook right now.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8407?t=4&akid=8027%2E868730%2Ed05asT) | [SHARE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8407?t=5&akid=8027%2E868730%2Ed05asT)
---
But we know that while there is peril in the fight to defeat climate change, there is also promise.
We can use this as an opportunity to create a more just and equitable future, create millions of jobs, and rescue our future. The climate crisis can feel like an enormous, intractable problem.
But I'm here to remind you that the solutions are already available today. We just have to put them to work -- now.
I'm ready. I hope you are, too.
Very truly yours,
Jay
[SHARE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8407?t=6&akid=8027%2E868730%2Ed05asT)
---

I want to make sure every Hoosier has a chance to become a part of this movement. We’re Putting People First. If you want to help us build our movement this January, please consider reading my team’s note below and contributing any amount at this safe and secure link: Thank you for your time, -Eric — — — Forwarded content — — — From: Holcomb Crew Subject: our movement is different To: | | | | ---|---|--- Friend, We’ve been clear from the start. We’re building our movement from the ground up — this campaign is built around Hoosiers, and it’s funded by Hoosiers, too. It’s folks just like you...Hoosiers all across Indiana who believe in Governor Holcomb’s team-driven mission of Putting People First and delivering results for ALL Hoosiers. We want Hoosiers from all walks of life and every part of this state to join our movement. That’s why we’re asking for small-dollar donations this month — gifts of , or This campaign is not about big dollars or splashy headlines. It’s about providing every single Hoosier the opportunity to go as far as they want in life as long as they’re willing to work for it. It’s about building a campaign that all Hoosiers can be a part of. Thank you, Holcomb Crew Contributions by corporations and labor organizations are limited to $5,000 annually; contributions by individuals, LLCs and political committees are unlimited. Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited. You may also contribute by check made out to "Eric Holcomb For Indiana" and mailed to 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204. | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. name: Kim Maier
subject: It's crunch time, friends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
We are only 40 weeks out from Election Day, and we need to meet our end of month goal to send a clear message to Chris Smith: we will not let him celebrate his 40th year in Congress.
|
---

| | Hey team, We are only 40 weeks out from Election Day, and we need to meet our end-of-month goal to send a clear message to Chris Smith: we will not let him celebrate his 40th year in Congress. _As we close in on the end of January, it 's officially crunch time. We have to hit our goal of $4,000 -- _$100 for each of Chris Smith's nearly 40 years in Washington. [**Can you help us reach that goal with a quick donation?**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0ed/522d4087/7afed873/4f3411a4/3545909377/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-january?refcode=SMD_20200130_eom1_em_fr_all_L1") | **[Click here to chip in>>](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0ed/522d4087/7afed873/4f3411a3/3545909377/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-january?refcode=SMD_20200130_eom1_em_fr_all_btn1")**
---
Stephanie is ready to go to Washington and fight for what really matters to our community: affordable health care, a fair economy, and good, safe schools for our children.
Yesterday Gov. Murphy made clear that our district is in play in 2020--he even called out Chris Smith by name. We couldn't agree more. Let's show Chris Smith just how competitive this race is with strong fundraising to end the first month of 2020.
**Hitting this critical goal will go a long way towards victory in November. We need your help now.**
[_**Can you chip in any amount right now?**_](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0ed/522d4087/7afed873/4f3411a2/3545909377/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-january?refcode=SMD_20200130_eom1_em_fr_all_L2")
**[Click here to chip in>>](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0ed/522d4087/7afed873/4f3411a3/3545909377/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-january?refcode=SMD_20200130_eom1_em_fr_all_btn1")**
---
Kim Campaign Manager

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0ed/522d4087/7afed873/4f3411a1/3545909377/VEsD/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-january?refcode=SMD_20200130_eom1_em_fr_all_ftr")**
---

|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: Beto’s note from this morning
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

We
wanted to make sure you had a chance to see Beto’s note about the results
of Tuesday’s election.

It’s important you read it because now is not the time for despair. We
have a lot to be proud of, and a lot to look forward to (like Eliz running
in the general election in November, along with dozens of other key
candidates that Powered By People intends to support). But that work
requires resources, and we’re facing our first fundraising deadline of the
year on January 31st.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42166?refcode=ema20200130-78352&t=1001&akid=78352%2E444211%2E-zUcJ7 ]So, we’re asking: can you please read Beto’s note below and then pitch
in $3 before midnight tomorrow? Our electoral strength depends on the
strength of our grassroots fundraising. We’re counting on your support.

Thanks for everything. We
can’t wait to continue this work with all of you.

- Powered By People

---------- Forwarded message ---------

From: Beto O'Rourke <info@betoorourke.com>
Date: Thu, Jan 30, 2020 at 9:23 AM
Subject: Thank you
To:

<dpwillis67@gmail.com>

Thank you for working so hard to help Eliz Markowitz in her race to
represent the people of Fort Bend and the 28th House district in the Texas
legislature.

Election night was tough. Not the outcome that we wanted. But we knew from
the start that this was a long shot; we knew Eliz had only received 39% of
the vote in the November special election; we knew her opponent had lent
his own campaign $1.5 million. But we also knew that as the first election
of the most important year of our lives we had to try and we had to do our
best.

I am confident we did. Together, more than 1,100 of us knocked on over
41,000 doors. And beyond the direct engagement with voters, we had fun, we
connected with old friends and had the chance to make new ones. As Thomas
from Lubbock put it, we all got to be a family again.

While we didn’t win, we helped produce the largest turnout in a runoff
special election in Texas history. We helped improve Eliz’s performance
over the November election by 3 points. And most importantly — the tens of
thousands of conversations we had with voters laid the groundwork for her
to have a fighting chance in the November matchup for this same seat.

This is just the beginning. Not only does Eliz have another chance to win
in less than ten months, we now have the ability to bring Powered by
People volunteers to bear on state house elections throughout Texas. I
hope you will be one of them.

If we stay focused, if we stay after it, we will achieve our goal of
electing a Democratic majority in the state house for the first time since
2001.

Keep up the fight and keep the faith,

Beto

[2]Beto blockwalk

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=78352%2E444211%2E-zUcJ7

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

| | Hey, your friendly National Finance Manager here (again). We made major progress since my last email. What many people don't realize is that these emails asking for money (I know we send a lot of them, sorry) are the core driver of growth and momentum for grassroots campaigns like ours.
**Contributions like yours are invested directly into what we do every day.**
We held 14 town halls this month - you know how we were able to print the invites and book community spaces? Grassroots contributions.
We opened new offices for volunteers and organizers to gather across the state - you know how we were able to do that? Grassroots contributions.
So, yeah, grassroots donations are REALLY important to the movement we are building. And it's because of grassroots donors like _you_ that we are able to create this structure to elect Joe Kennedy as the next Senator from Massachusetts.

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I'm endorsing Rev. Warnock for U.S. Senate in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
Wherever there is need, Reverend Warnock can be found on the front lines. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5e7/34a064cc/1b7b9e01/7034ae0/3686022283/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Hi Friend - For the past 15 years, I have watched Reverend Raphael Warnock lead on issues of social justice, economic access and voting rights. I have fought beside him to end voter suppression. I worked with him to protect the Affordable Care Act and to expand Medicaid. I prayed with him as we worried for our fellow Americans who have not benefited from an economy that demands more and more from them but delivers less and less. _Wherever there is need, Reverend Warnock can be found on the front lines._ And that's where we need him at this moment. On the front lines of the battle for the soul of America. **So today, as he kicks off his campaign, I am proud to endorse Reverend Raphael Warnock for the U.S. Senate because Georgia must have a leader who sees all of us and serves all of us.** Georgia deserves a proven leader like Raphael Warnock - a son of South Georgia who knows our state inside and out - he's traveled its highways, visited its towns and served its people for decades. But he can't win this campaign alone, that's where you come in: **[Will you chip in $3 today to become a Founding Donor of Reverend Warnock's campaign for U.S. Senate in Georgia and help him kick off his campaign today?](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5e7/34a064cc/1b7b9e01/7034ae1/3686022283/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwMTMwMjBSV0UtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya?refcode=IE013020RWE-1-b")** We stood shoulder to shoulder on the toughest fights, against opponents who used their power to belittle and erase their fellow Georgians. As the daughter of ministers, I deeply respect how he has led Ebenezer Baptist Church forward - living the truth of his calling by launching programs to serve families in public housing, HIV/AIDS patients in need of respite and those who struggle with addiction. That's why I stand with Reverend Raphael Warnock as the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. Join me today and stand with us as we show America what true leadership looks like. You can use this link: **[https://secure.fairfightaction.com/Warnock](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5e7/34a064cc/1b7b9e01/7034ae1/3686022283/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwMTMwMjBSV0UtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya?refcode=IE013020RWE-1-b")** \- Stacey Abrams **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5e7/34a064cc/1b7b9e01/7034ae1/3686022283/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwMTMwMjBSV0UtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya?refcode=IE013020RWE-1-b")**
---

|

[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5e7/34a064cc/1b7b9e01/7034aee/3686022283/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5e7/34a064cc/1b7b9e01/7034aef/3686022283/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5e7/34a064cc/1b7b9e01/7034aec/3686022283/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

**Tomorrow** is our January FEC deadline and our fundraising totals get locked in.

**After that** , reporters will be waiting for our FEC report to be published -- and all eyes will be on us to see if we really have the resources to power this grassroots movement.

**But right now** , we haven't yet hit our goal -- and if we don't pick up the pace, it's going to fall further out of reach.

subject: Announcing endorsements by Lt. Governor and local 7th district officials!
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| Friends,

Did you see? Today I released a list of local officials, including Lt. Gov. Geoff Duncan, who have endorsed my campaign for Georgia's 7th Congressional District!

---
| [Donate](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=b8fe9d7aec&e=c1dbff800f "Donate")
---
|
* * *
| Lieutenant Governor Geoff Duncan | State of Georgia
---|---
Sheriff Butch Conway | Gwinnett County
District Attorney Daniel Porter | Gwinnett County
Commission Chair Charlotte Nash | Gwinnett County
Commissioner Molly Cooper | Forsyth County, District 1
Commissioner Cindy Jones-Mills | Forsyth County, District 4
Representative Brett Harrell | Georgia House District 106
Mayor Linda Blechinger | City of Auburn
Mayor Bill Orr | City of Braselton
Commission Chairman Phillip Beard | City of Buford
Mayor Trey King | City of Dacula
Mayor Nancy Harris | City of Duluth
Mayor Allison Wilkerson | City of Grayson
Fmr. Mayor Judy Jordan-Johnson | City of Lawrenceville
Fmr. Mayor Johnny Crist | City of Lilburn
Mayor Rey Martinez | City of Loganville
Mayor Mike Mason | City of Peachtree Corners
Mayor Kenneth Waycaster | City of Rest Haven
Mayor Barbara Bender | City of Snellville
Mayor Steve Edwards | City of Sugar Hill
Mayor Jimmy Burnette | City of Suwanee

* * *
| I am honored to have the support of so many dedicated public servants from Forsyth and Gwinnett counties. >From the beginning, my campaign has focused on the kitchen table issues that matter most to our community and its citizens, and I am humbled by the confidence these local officials have placed in me to fight for our shared values in Washington.

---
| Thank you so much for your support in this journey.

-Renee
---
|

name: Sara 2020
subject: Susan Collins is trying to have it both ways by voting with McConnell when it counts and then putting on a big show about how she's maybe thinking of considering allowing witnesses.
body:
We're tired of it.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ef9/4bef7a87/6a95f735/287fb2c3/3962625024/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
Senator Collins voted ten times against witnesses and evidence during a Senate session that lasted into the middle of the night. Now, she says she's exploring the idea of allowing witnesses and having a "number of conversations" about it.
As MSNBC pundit Jeff Toobin so eloquently said, "Give me a break!"
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ef9/4bef7a87/6a95f735/287fb2c2/3962625024/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMzAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-toobin?refcode=em200130-2-full&noskip=true")
Susan Collins is trying to have it both ways by voting with McConnell when it counts and then putting on a big show about how she's maybe thinking of considering allowing witnesses.
We're tired of it -- if you are too, chip in to defeat Susan Collins now:
**[Act.SaraGideon.com/Impeachment](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ef9/4bef7a87/6a95f735/287fb2c1/3962625024/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMzAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-toobin?refcode=em200130-2-full")**
Thanks for your fight,
Team Sara
**********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ef9/4bef7a87/6a95f735/287fb2c1/3962625024/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMzAtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-toobin?refcode=em200130-2-full")**********

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ef9/4bef7a87/6a95f735/287fb2c0/3962625024/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ef9/4bef7a87/6a95f735/287fb2c7/3962625024/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ef9/4bef7a87/6a95f735/287fb2c6/3962625024/VEsB/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Team Hick
subject: First, then, now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
The news this week has been beyond frustrating, folks -- **__FIRST:__** Donald Trump hosted a fundraiser for our opponent, Senator Cory Gardner, and raised him more than $100,000 as a thank you for having "his back on impeachment." **__THEN:__** Gardner announced he's voting with Mitch McConnell to block witnesses in Trump's impeachment trial -- making this "trial" a complete sham. **__NOW:__** Republicans are rushing to end the impeachment proceedings as soon as possible, and Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are hosting a $30,000 per plate fundraiser for Cory Gardner tonight. **Enough is enough!** Cory Gardner always _(okay...98% of the time)_ stands with Trump and McConnell over the people of Colorado who deserve an independent voice with the courage to stand up and do the right thing when it counts. **Rush a donation of $10 or more to help our campaign defeat Cory Gardner and flip this Senate seat in November:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200130-fr?refcode=em-200130-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
